title: Migrate from deprecated Apache Kafka 2.x to Kafka 3.7+
description: Core message broker runs Kafka 2.8 which reaches end-of-life in Q1 2026. The Kafka 2.x client libraries have known vulnerabilities (CVE-2023-25194) and are incompatible with the new KRaft consensus protocol needed to eliminate ZooKeeper dependency. Migration requires updating all 14 producer services and 22 consumer services, plus rewriting custom partition assignors.

title: Eliminate vendor lock-in on proprietary transformation engine
description: The data transformation layer relies on VendorX's proprietary ETL SDK ($180K/year license). VendorX was acquired last quarter and the new parent company announced a 3x price increase effective January 2026. Need to evaluate open-source alternatives (Apache Beam, dbt, custom Flink jobs) and plan migration off the proprietary SDK.

title: Python 3.9 EOL migration for all pipeline workers
description: Pipeline worker services run Python 3.9 which reaches end-of-life October 2025. Need to upgrade to Python 3.12 across 8 services. Key blockers: numpy 1.x dependency incompatible with 3.12, custom C extensions need recompilation, and the internal ML library uses removed asyncio APIs (loop parameter).

title: Replace single-region Redis cluster with multi-region caching
description: The entire caching layer is a single Redis 6 cluster in us-east-1. Redis 6 EOL is March 2026. Additionally, customers in EU and APAC regions experience 200ms+ cache miss latency. Need to migrate to Redis 7+ with multi-region replication or evaluate alternative caching solutions (DragonflyDB, KeyDB).

title: Create dependency health dashboard and automated CVE alerting
description: There is no centralized view of dependency health across the platform. Engineers discover EOL and CVE issues reactively. Build a dashboard showing all runtime dependencies with versions, EOL dates, known CVEs, and upgrade paths. Integrate with GitHub Dependabot and Snyk for automated alerting.
